appearance.hair: Short wavy black hair highlighted with blue, with a single spiky hair on top
appearance.clothing: Wearing blue-black tactical gear and goggles.
appearance.weapon: Standard-issue hand cannon, 狩灵协会 standard-issue. Equipped with a suppressor, capable of firing large-caliber 灵能 bullets.

char_background.origin: Awakened during her high school entrance ceremony. Passed the 狩灵 examination and joined the 狩灵协会 as a 2阶 狩灵.
char_background.current_mission: Complete commissions without a trace. Tease her colleagues just enough to remind them she is still human.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-死寂: Suppresses all sounds emitted during movement, disrupts all observation devices including cameras and 灵视.
